title: Security: localStorage of file:// can be read from any remote origin through a blob: document with the origin of null
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
The data in localStorage of file:// can be stolen from any remote origin through blob: documents.  
The detailed way to steal is written below.  
  
**VERSION**   
Chrome Version: 44.0.2403.107 stable  
Operating System: Windows 8 Pro, OSX Yosemite 10.10.4
